name: Another Freezer Pickle
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix vinegar, sugar, celery seed, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture over onions and sliced cucumbers.
3. Refrigerate for 4 or 5 days, stirring every day.
4. Transfer to plastic cartons and place in the freezer.
Note: Freezing these pickles in ziploc bags last year resulted in leaks, so using plastic cartons is recommended this year.
